root_text.sn47.22:1.2: Ekamantaṁ nisinno kho āyasmā bhaddo āyasmantaṁ ānandaṁ etadavoca:
root_text.sn47.22:1.3: “ko nu kho, āvuso ānanda, hetu, ko paccayo yena tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo na ciraṭṭhitiko hoti?
root_text.sn47.22:1.4: Ko panāvuso ānanda, hetu, ko paccayo yena tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo ciraṭṭhitiko hotī”ti?
root_text.sn47.22:2.2: Bhaddako kho te, āvuso bhadda, ummaṅgo, bhaddakaṁ paṭibhānaṁ, kalyāṇī paripucchā.
root_text.sn47.22:2.4: ‘ko nu kho, āvuso ānanda, hetu, ko paccayo yena tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo na ciraṭṭhitiko hoti?
root_text.sn47.22:2.5: Ko panāvuso ānanda, hetu, ko paccayo yena tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo ciraṭṭhitiko hotī’”ti?
root_text.sn47.22:2.7: “Catunnaṁ kho, āvuso, satipaṭṭhānānaṁ abhāvitattā abahulīkatattā tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo na ciraṭṭhitiko hoti.
root_text.sn47.22:2.8: Catunnañca kho, āvuso, satipaṭṭhānānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo ciraṭṭhitiko hoti.
root_text.sn47.22:3.2: Idhāvuso, bhikkhu kāye kāyānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā, vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ;
root_text.sn47.22:3.5: dhammesu dhammānupassī viharati ātāpī sampajāno satimā, vineyya loke abhijjhādomanassaṁ.
root_text.sn47.22:3.6: Imesaṁ kho, āvuso, catunnaṁ satipaṭṭhānānaṁ abhāvitattā abahulīkatattā tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo na ciraṭṭhitiko hoti.
root_text.sn47.22:3.7: Imesañca kho, āvuso, catunnaṁ satipaṭṭhānānaṁ bhāvitattā bahulīkatattā tathāgate parinibbute saddhammo ciraṭṭhitiko hotī”ti.

translation_text.sn47.22:1.3: “What is the cause, Reverend Ānanda, what is the reason why the true teaching does not last long after the final quenching of the Realized One?
translation_text.sn47.22:1.4: What is the cause, what is the reason why the true teaching does last long after the final quenching of the Realized One?”
translation_text.sn47.22:2.2: Your approach and articulation are excellent, and it’s a good question.
translation_text.sn47.22:2.4: ‘What is the cause, Reverend Ānanda, what is the reason why the true teaching does not last long after the final quenching of the Realized One?
translation_text.sn47.22:2.5: What is the cause, what is the reason why the true teaching does last long after the final quenching of the Realized One?’”
translation_text.sn47.22:2.7: “It’s because of not developing and cultivating the four kinds of mindfulness meditation that the true teaching doesn’t last long after the final quenching of the Realized One.
translation_text.sn47.22:2.8: It’s because of developing and cultivating the four kinds of mindfulness meditation that the true teaching does last long after the final quenching of the Realized One.
translation_text.sn47.22:3.2: It’s when a mendicant meditates by observing an aspect of the body—keen, aware, and mindful, rid of covetousness and displeasure for the world.
translation_text.sn47.22:3.3: They meditate observing an aspect of feelings …
translation_text.sn47.22:3.5: principles—keen, aware, and mindful, rid of covetousness and displeasure for the world.
translation_text.sn47.22:3.6: It’s because of not developing and cultivating these four kinds of mindfulness meditation that the true teaching doesn’t last long after the final quenching of the Realized One.
translation_text.sn47.22:3.7: It’s because of developing and cultivating these four kinds of mindfulness meditation that the true teaching does last long after the final quenching of the Realized One.”
